title: VeloChampion Bike Puncture Repair Kit | Tyre Patches for Road, MTB, BMX, Ebike| Travel Size Bicycle Inner Tube Repair Kit | 6, 10 or 40 Pack + Optional Tyre Levers
features: ✅ MULTIPLE PACK OPTIONS FOR EVERY RIDER – Choose from our 10-pack or 40-pack puncture repair patches, or our 6-pack kit with bike tyre repair kit levers. Perfect for Road, MTB, BMX, Commuter bikes and E-Bikes, these kits help you handle punctures fast.
✅ PREMIUM BIKE PUNCTURE REPAIR PATCHES – Designed to stretch, flex, and bond securely, our cycle puncture repair kit patches create a long-lasting seal so you can get back on the road in minutes.
✅ VERSATILE FOR ALL INNER TUBES – This puncture repair kit works on all bicycle inner tubes, plus prams, wheelchairs, and even doubles as an airbed repair kit when travelling.

✅ COMPACT & EASY TO CARRY – Our lightweight bicycle puncture repair kits come in a portable case that fits into any saddlebag, jersey pocket, or toolkit, making it a perfect addition to your bike accessories.

✅ SIMPLE REPAIR PROCESS: 1️⃣ Locate the puncture and clean the area. 2️⃣ Lightly buff the inner tube with sandpaper. 3️⃣ Choose your size and peel the backing from the patch. 4️⃣ Press the repair patch firmly on to the inner tube for 30 seconds from the centre pressing outwards. 5️⃣Wait another 30 seconds for the patch to bond to the innter tube before inflating.
description: Choose from multiple pack options to suit every rider’s needs—whether it's our 10-pack or 40-pack puncture repair patches, or the 6-pack kit complete with tyre levers, these kits are ideal for Road, MTB, BMX, Commuter bikes, and E-Bikes, helping you tackle punctures quickly. Our premium patches are designed to stretch, flex, and bond securely for a long-lasting seal, getting you back on the road in minutes. Versatile and reliable, this puncture repair kit works on all bicycle inner tubes and is also suitable for prams, wheelchairs, and even doubles as an airbed repair kit when travelling.
